== Notes for [[Item:Q105086|Q105086]] ==

In March 1632, Fray Pedro Sambrano, the friar at the Pueblo of Galisteo, mentioned the name of Gerónimo Pacehco (ONMF: 83), who was described as a mestizo and a soldier. (AGN, Inq, t. 304, 189v)

http://digital.denverlibrary.org/cdm/compoundobject/collection/p16079coll18/id/64110/rec/1

https://www.wikitree.com/genealogy/Pacheco-Descendants-12

http://pages.prodigy.net/bluemountain1/bonmf8.htm

* Reference: [https://www.ancestry.com/family-tree/person/tree/110326636/person/120078390455 Ancestry Genealogy] - [https://www.geni.com/projects/SmartCopy/18783 SmartCopy]: ''Aug 22 2017, 17:07:38 UTC''

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000001500722077

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
